author: @wecassell
text:
Donald Trump expelled Jeffrey Epstein from his Mar-a-Lago club in 2007. Trump barred Epstein from the Palm Beach, Florida, club after Epstein was accused of inappropriate behavior — including reportedly hitting on a teenage daughter of another member — and his membership account was closed around October 2007.
Jeffrey Epstein’s first criminal conviction for a sexual offense occurred in 2008. On June 30, 2008, he pleaded guilty in a Florida state court to two state charges:
-Soliciting prostitution, and
-Soliciting prostitution involving a minor.
The publicly documented period of Bill Gates’s interactions with Epstein spans roughly 2011 to around 2013–2014.
-Started: ~2011 (first meetings)
-Continued: Through 2013, possibly into 2014 based on reporting
-Ended: By the mid-2010s when Gates concluded there was no substantive philanthropic collaboration
Epstein’s known White House entries come from visitor logs during Bill Clinton’s presidency (1993–1995), first recorded on February 25, 1993, and totaling at least 17 entries during that period.

So we haven't had any of these shows since 2016, and we aren't missing much.
